resources.string: Stage files from any app and share them elsewhere without losing your place. Files auto-expire after 24 hours.
The floating bubble needs permission to appear on top of other apps while you multitask.
A small notification keeps the floating shelf visible while files are staged.

File Shelf runs a foreground service to keep the floating bubble visible while you move files between apps. No data leaves your device. The service stops when you dismiss the shelf or clear all files.
Share a file from any app and choose File Shelf.
Enable overlay permission for the floating bubble, or use this screen to manage files.
Open the destination app, then long-press a file to drag it there. Select multiple files and long-press any selected file to drag them all as a bundle.
Long-press to drag to any app

1. Open any app (Gallery, Drive, Messages, etc.)
2. Find the file you want to stage
3. Tap Share and select "File Shelf"
4. File appears on your shelf instantly

You can add files from multiple apps before sharing them all at once.

• Tap the bubble → Opens the shelf panel
• Drag the bubble → Repositions it on screen
• Drag to bottom edge → Hides the bubble
• Badge shows number of staged files

The bubble appears when you have files and can be toggled from this screen.
Tap the share icon on any file to open the system share menu. Choose where to send your file.

Single File:
• Long-press any file in the panel
• Drag to your destination app
• Release to drop

Multiple Files (Bundle):
1. Tap "Select all" or select files individually
2. Long-press any selected file
3. Drag the bundle to your app
4. All selected files transfer together

• Tap "Select all" to select everything
• Or tap individual files to select them
• Share or drag icon appears when selected
• Tap files again to deselect

Selection mode exits after sharing or dragging.

• Tap trash icon to remove a single file
• Tap "Clear All" to remove everything
• Confirmation dialog prevents accidents

The shelf service stops when all files are cleared to save battery.
Files are automatically removed after 24 hours to keep your device storage clean.\n\nYour files are never uploaded anywhere—everything stays on your device.

Display Over Other Apps:
Required for the floating bubble to appear on top of other apps.

Notifications:
Keeps the shelf visible while files are staged. You can manage this in Android settings.
Tap below to see the first-time setup tutorial again.
Choose files to share or drag together
Tap files to select, then long-press one to drag the group
Drop not accepted — try sharing instead
